title: Natural Cycles - FDA-Approved Digital Birth Control & Femtech Platform
problem: Women lack hormone-free, data-driven contraceptive options. Traditional birth control has side effects; fertility awareness methods are often unreliable.
solution: FDA-cleared digital birth control app using temperature tracking and algorithms to predict fertile days. Now expanded to cover full reproductive lifecycle: birth control, pregnancy planning, pregnancy tracking, postpartum, and menopause.
technology: Algorithm-based fertility prediction, temperature monitoring, wearable integration
target_customer: Women seeking hormone-free contraception, fertility tracking, lifecycle health
regulatory_notes: FDA-cleared as digital contraceptive. CE marked in EU. Expanding regulatory pathway for lifecycle health.
varden_fit: LOW - B2C femtech with limited overlap to Varden's B2B clinic marketplace. Interesting for women's health module but different target market. Watch for potential B2B employer/insurance partnerships.
notes: World's first FDA-approved digital contraceptive. Expanding from birth control to full reproductive lifecycle. Developing own wearable hardware. Strong brand in femtech.
